headline: Fine Art Collector Program, 2X Casino Heist, 4X KnoWay Out Missions
quickTake: Fine Art Collector Program: Log in for a free Benefactor Turreted Limo and GTA$500,000
Tier 2: Complete any Heist to unlock the NOOSE Outfit and an extra GTA$1,000,000
2X GTA$ and RP on the Diamond Casino Heist finale (Artwork guaranteed)
4X GTA$ and RP on KnoWay Out Missions

items.label: 4X GTA$ and RP on KnoWay Out Missions
2X GTA$ and RP on The Diamond Casino Heist Finale
Guaranteed Artwork in the Casino Vault
Extra GTA$100,000 bonus for looting the daily vault during the Casino Heist
Complete any Heist to unlock the NOOSE Outfit and a GTA$1,000,000 bonus
Log in to get the Benefactor Turreted Limo for free
Log in to get a free GTA$500,000 bonus
40% bonus GTA$ on all Shark Card purchases
Free upgrade to PS5/Xbox Series version of GTA V for older console players

beginnerPath.label: Simply log in this week to claim a free Benefactor Turreted Limo and a massive GTA$500,000.
Grind KnoWay Out Missions — at 4X payouts, this is incredibly lucrative for new players.
If you don't own an Arcade yet, join someone else's Diamond Casino Heist for 2X pay.

locations.name: Start from the pause menu
locations.note: Pause Menu → Online → Jobs → Rockstar Created → Missions.

locations.name: Your Arcade
locations.note: Launch the finale from your Arcade planning board.

locations.name: Warstock Cache & Carry
locations.note: Claim it for $0, then call Pegasus to spawn it.
